objective: Re-reviewed the T03 run_explore agent loop (mode steering, two-level tool gating, Balanced phase machine, bounds, tests) against the approved PLAN and all 8 ACs after the prior revision verdict.
key_changes: RESOLVED (blocking): clippy -p grove-cst --lib --all-targets -- -D warnings now clean; dead-code helpers empty_test_root/rand_suffix removed from agent.rs.
RESOLVED (blocking): BALANCED_RECON_TURNS = 2 in toolset.rs, matching AC-4 and the approved PLAN (was 8).
RESOLVED: config.rs field_reassign_with_default lint fixed via struct-update syntax.
Verified independently: 39 explore tests pass; no 'fastcontext' in core/src; core Cargo.toml clap-free.
AC-1 signature exact + re-exported from mod.rs; AC-2 7 ops in-process + shell via Command(current_dir=root).
AC-3 two-level gating sound; shell allowlist checked pre-spawn, args as vector, no interpolation.
AC-4 modes-as-data; Aggressive tool_choice hint correctly dropped (prompt-only steering); Balanced 3-phase machine correct.
AC-5 bounds -> Ok(ExploreAnswer{truncated:true}); AC-6 ClientError::Connection -> ExploreError::ProviderDown.
ADVISORY: byte_bound_terminates_loop asserts nothing and never crosses the 128 KiB bound; byte path untested.
ADVISORY: aggressive_toolset_same_as_standard is tautological; never constructs Mode::Aggressive.
ADVISORY: submit_plan special-case precedes is_in_toolset gate; hallucinated submit_plan in Standard/Aggressive is honoured, not refused (benign, minor AC-3 edge).
ADVISORY: balanced_phase_transitions test under-asserts (checks completion, not toolset narrowing to submit_plan-only).
